message:
Fix subagent rendering: tree resolution, Agent/Subagent labels, inline results

- Switch subagent API from flat buildConversationThread to tree-based
  buildMessageTree + resolveActivePath (matches main session, picks
  correct active branch instead of including sidechains)
- SubagentPanel now builds tool result map, continuation flags, and
  consumed-uuid tracking (same as InfiniteMessageList)
- User messages labeled "Agent" in subagent threads (the caller is
  the primary agent, not the human)
- Assistant messages labeled "Subagent" in subagent threads

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
